sentences.target: Je suis candidat pour ce poste.

translations.fr: Je suis candidat pour ce poste.
translations.en: I am a candidate for this position.
translations.de: Ich bin Kandidat für diese Stelle.
translations.zh-Hans: 我是这个职位的候选人。
translations.yue: 我係呢個職位嘅候選人。
translations.vi: Tôi là ứng viên cho vị trí này.
translations.nl: Ik ben kandidaat voor deze functie.
translations.hi: मैं इस पद के लिए उम्मीदवार हूँ.
translations.el: Είμαι υποψήφιος για αυτή τη θέση.
translations.nb: Jeg er kandidat til denne stillingen.
translations.sv: Jag är kandidat till den här tjänsten.
translations.da: Jeg er kandidat til denne stilling.

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative 1sg; links the subject to the predicate nominal.
Common noun, masculine singular; predicate nominal (profession/status) after the copula.
Preposition introducing a purpose/target complement.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'poste'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'pour'.

translations.en: We choose a candidate on Sunday.
translations.es: Elegimos a un candidato el domingo.
translations.de: Wir wählen am Sonntag einen Kandidaten.
translations.zh-Hans: 周日我们选择一名候选人。
translations.yue: 我哋星期日揀一位候選人。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi chọn một ứng viên vào Chủ nhật.
translations.hi: हम रविवार को एक उम्मीदवार चुनते हैं.
translations.nb: På søndag velger vi en kandidat.
translations.id: Pada hari Minggu kami memilih seorang kandidat.
translations.sv: På söndag väljer vi en kandidat.
translations.da: På søndag vælger vi en kandidat.
translations.ja: 日曜日に候補者を選びます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/colloquial subject pronoun; syntactically 3rd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 3sg; expresses the action 'to choose'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces a non-specific noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'choisit'.
Noun denoting a day of the week; adverbial time modifier ('on Sunday').

sentences.target: Mon frère reste candidat malgré tout.

translations.fr: Mon frère reste candidat malgré tout.
translations.en: My brother remains a candidate despite everything.
translations.es: Mi hermano sigue siendo candidato a pesar de todo.
translations.de: Mein Bruder bleibt trotz allem Kandidat.
translations.it: Mio fratello rimane candidato nonostante tutto.
translations.ko: 내 형은 모든 것에도 불구하고 여전히 후보입니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我哥哥仍然是候选人，尽管如此。
translations.yue: 我哥哥無論點樣仍然係候選人。
translations.ru: Мой брат остаётся кандидатом, несмотря ни на что.
translations.pt: Meu irmão continua candidato apesar de tudo.
translations.tr: Erkek kardeşim her şeye rağmen aday olmaya devam ediyor.
translations.vi: Anh trai tôi vẫn là ứng viên bất chấp mọi thứ.
translations.ar: أخي يبقى مرشحًا رغم كل شيء.
translations.nl: Mijn broer blijft kandidaat ondanks alles.
translations.uk: Мій брат залишається кандидатом, незважаючи ні на що.
translations.hu: A fivérem minden ellenére jelölt marad.
translations.hi: मेरा भाई हर चीज़ के बावजूद उम्मीदवार बना रहता है.
translations.pl: Mój brat pozostaje kandydatem mimo wszystko.
translations.el: Ο αδελφός μου παραμένει υποψήφιος παρά τα πάντα.
translations.nb: Broren min forblir kandidat til tross for alt.
translations.id: Saudara laki-laki saya tetap menjadi kandidat meski begitu.
translations.sv: Min bror förblir kandidat trots allt.
translations.ro: Fratele meu rămâne candidat în ciuda tuturor.
translations.cs: Můj bratr zůstává kandidátem navzdory všemu.
translations.da: Min bror forbliver kandidat trods alt.
translations.ja: 兄は何があっても候補のままです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; masculine singular agreeing with 'frère'.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject NP.
Main verb, present indicative 3sg; linking verb here meaning 'to remain/stay'.
Common noun, masculine singular; predicate nominal complement after 'rester'.
Preposition introducing a concession complement.
Indefinite pronoun; object of 'malgré' in the fixed expression 'malgré tout' ('in spite of everything').

sentences.target: Ils attendent le candidat dans la salle.
sentences.reading: /il za.tɑ̃d lə kɑ̃.di.da dɑ̃ la sal/

translations.fr: Ils attendent le candidat dans la salle.
translations.ipa: /il za.tɑ̃d lə kɑ̃.di.da dɑ̃ la sal/
translations.en: They are waiting for the candidate in the room.
translations.es: Están esperando al candidato en la sala.
translations.de: Sie warten im Raum auf den Kandidaten.
translations.it: Stanno aspettando il candidato nella sala.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们在房间里等候候选人。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺房間入面等候候選人。
translations.pt: Eles estão esperando o candidato na sala.
translations.vi: Họ đang chờ ứng viên trong phòng.
translations.nl: Ze wachten op de kandidaat in de zaal.
translations.hi: वे कमरे में उम्मीदवार का इंतज़ार कर रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Oni czekają na kandydata w sali.
translations.nb: De venter på kandidaten i rommet.
translations.id: Mereka sedang menunggu kandidat di ruangan.
translations.sv: De väntar på kandidaten i rummet.
translations.ro: Ei îl așteaptă pe candidat în sală.
translations.da: De venter på kandidaten i lokalet.
translations.ja: 彼らは部屋で候補者を待っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person plural (masculine or mixed); subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative 3pl; 'attendre' takes a direct object in French.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'candidat'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'attendent'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'salle'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.
